title: peucedanum paucipartitum
intro: Peucedanum paucipartitum, also known as the Chinese angelica or Qian Li Geng, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Peucedanum paucipartitum include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma, and treating menstrual disorders, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
intro_study: According to the given study, peucedanum paucipartitum benefits include having vasorelaxant, cardioprotective, hepatoprotective, anti-tumor and anti-platelet aggregative effects.
